context: Tests whether the agent correctly maps payment integration architectures to PCI SAQ types, applies the SAQ A preference for scope reduction, correctly distinguishes SAQ A from SAQ A-EP, and identifies the right number of controls for each SAQ type.

checklist.name: SAQ D identification
checklist.description: Correctly identifies that Approach C (card data passes through own server) requires SAQ D

checklist.name: SAQ D control count
checklist.description: States that SAQ D involves approximately 330 controls

checklist.name: SAQ A identification
checklist.description: Correctly identifies that Approach A (fully hosted redirect / Stripe Checkout) qualifies for SAQ A

checklist.name: SAQ A control count
checklist.description: States that SAQ A involves approximately 22 controls

checklist.name: SAQ A-EP identification
checklist.description: Correctly identifies that Approach B (JS tokenization on your own page / Stripe Elements) requires SAQ A-EP, NOT SAQ A

checklist.name: SAQ A-EP control count
checklist.description: States that SAQ A-EP involves approximately 191 controls

checklist.name: Hosted redirect recommendation
checklist.description: Recommends Approach A (fully hosted payment page / Stripe Checkout) as the preferred option for scope reduction

checklist.name: Scope reduction rationale
checklist.description: Explains that the key reason for recommending the hosted redirect is that card data never reaches ShopFast's servers

checklist.name: Server-side code sketch
checklist.description: Code sketch uses stripe.checkout.sessions.create() (or equivalent hosted session API) and redirects the customer to the session URL

checklist.name: Correct SAQ A scope description
checklist.description: Correctly describes the residual SAQ A controls (e.g. protecting the redirect link, not storing card data, maintaining the website environment) rather than overstating them

checklist.name: SAQ A-EP not conflated with SAQ A
checklist.description: Document does NOT incorrectly claim that Stripe Elements (JS on your own page) qualifies for SAQ A

checklist.name: Tokenization principle
checklist.description: Notes that using the recommended approach means card numbers are never stored, processed, or transmitted through ShopFast's systems
